---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Love at First Byte — AI in Academia"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
sidebar: false
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<script>document.body.classList.add('lafb-landing');</script>
```

::: {.lafb-hero}
<canvas id="constellation" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>

::: {.lafb-hero-inner}
<svg class="lafb-vamp" viewBox="0 0 120 128" role="img" aria-label="A friendly schematic vampire AI">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="vamp-collar" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7c3aed"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#0891b2"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <!-- circuit antenna (the "AI") -->
  <line x1="60" y1="20" x2="60" y2="34" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="2.4"/>
  <circle cx="60" cy="16" r="5" fill="#06b6d4"/>
  <line x1="24" y1="58" x2="10" y2="52" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="8" cy="51" r="3.2" fill="#64748b"/>
  <line x1="96" y1="58" x2="110" y2="52" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="112" cy="51" r="3.2" fill="#64748b"/>
  <!-- head -->
  <rect x="24" y="34" width="72" height="58" rx="22" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="3"/>
  <!-- widow's-peak hairline, a subtle vampire nod -->
  <path d="M30 46 Q60 30 90 46" fill="none" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <!-- eyes: one is an AI node -->
  <circle cx="46" cy="60" r="5.2" fill="#0891b2"/>
  <circle cx="74" cy="60" r="4" fill="#475569"/>
  <!-- gentle smile + two little fangs -->
  <path d="M46 74 Q60 84 74 74" fill="none" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M52 78 l3 7 l3 -7 z" fill="#e11d6b"/>
  <path d="M62 78 l3 7 l3 -7 z" fill="#e11d6b"/>
  <!-- cape collar -->
  <path d="M30 92 L60 110 L42 112 Z" fill="url(#vamp-collar)" opacity="0.9"/>
  <path d="M90 92 L60 110 L78 112 Z" fill="url(#vamp-collar)" opacity="0.9"/>
</svg>

<div class="lafb-eyebrow">NAPS · AI for Academia · 2026</div>

<h1 class="lafb-title">Love at First <span class="grad-text">Byte</span></h1>

<p class="lafb-sub">A hands-on workshop on using AI in pain science and academia — because in the era of AI, answers have become cheap, and it’s <em>judgment</em> that is expensive.</p>

<div class="lafb-cta">
  <a class="btn-lafb btn-primary-lafb" href="intro/overview.qmd">Start the Workshop →</a>
  <a class="btn-lafb btn-ghost-lafb" href="challenges/index.qmd">Browse Challenges</a>
</div>
:::

:::

::: {.lafb-section}
<div class="quote-block">
“In the era of AI, answers have become cheap. It’s judgment that is expensive.”
<span class="by">— Santiago Schnell, Provost, Dartmouth College</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.lafb-section}
## What you’ll do {.text-center}
<p class="lead">Two timed, collaborative AI challenges. You bring the research questions, AI brings the speed, and the room supplies the judgment.</p>

::: {.card-grid}
<a class="lafb-card" href="intro/overview.qmd">
<h3>🗺️ The Format</h3>
<p>A 90-minute arc: a brief intro, then two timed challenges you tackle with your table. See the schedule and how each one works.</p>
</a>
<a class="lafb-card" href="intro/tools.qmd">
<h3>🧰 The AI Toolkit</h3>
<p>The best free tools for beginners (chat apps) and for power users (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) — with setup links.</p>
</a>
<a class="lafb-card" href="challenges/index.qmd">
<h3>⚡ The Challenges</h3>
<p>From rescuing an unreadable figure to drafting a rebuttal to auditing your own grant — choose where to start.</p>
</a>
:::
:::

::: {.lafb-section}
<div class="stat-strip">
  <div class="stat"><div class="num">90</div><div class="lbl">minutes</div></div>
  <div class="stat"><div class="num">2</div><div class="lbl">collaborative challenges</div></div>
  <div class="stat"><div class="num">14</div><div class="lbl">challenges to choose from</div></div>
  <div class="stat"><div class="num">$0</div><div class="lbl">free tools, no subscription</div></div>
</div>
:::

::: {.lafb-section style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:4rem;"}
<a class="btn-lafb btn-primary-lafb" href="intro/overview.qmd">Get started →</a>
:::

<script src="assets/js/neural-constellation.js" defer></script>
